title: Convert to smaller units (sec, min, & hr)
description: Practice converting a measure of time to a smaller unit.
topic_path: Convert to smaller units (sec, min, & hr)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Convert.**  

${}$ | ${}$
-: | :-: | :-
$4$ minutes $52$ seconds | $=$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] seconds

[[☃ explanation 2]]
hints: We need to convert $\blueD{4}$ minutes $\maroonD{52}$ seconds to seconds.

First, let's convert $\blueD{4}$ minutes to seconds.

$1 \text{ minute} = \greenD{60}\text{ seconds}$


$\blueD{4} \text{ minutes} = \blueD{4}\times \greenD{60}=\blueD{240}\text{ seconds}$

Now, we need to add $\maroonD{52}$ seconds.

$\blueD{240}\text{ seconds}+\maroonD{52}\text{ seconds}=292\text{ seconds}$

options.explanation:
Conversions| | | |||
- | | | |
$1$ kilometer $= 1{,}000$ meters| | $1$ minute $= 60$ seconds|| $1$ liter$= 1{,}000$ milliliters|
$1$ meter $= 100$ centimeter| |$1$ hour $= 60$ minutes|| $1$ kilogram $= 1{,}000$ grams|
$1$ meter $= 1{,}000$ millimeters|| ||$1$ gram $= 1{,}000$ milligrams|
$1$ centimeter $= 10$ millimeters|| |||

assessment_items.question_content:
**Convert.**  

${}$ | ${}$
-: | :-: | :-
$2$ hours $45$ minutes | $=$ | [[☃ numeric-input 1]] minutes

[[☃ explanation 2]]
hints: We need to convert $\blueD{2}$ hours $\maroonD{45}$ minutes to minutes.

First, let's convert $\blueD{2}$ hours to minutes.

$1 \text{ hour} = \greenD{60}\text{ minutes}$


$\blueD{2} \text{ hours} = \blueD{2}\times \greenD{60}=\blueD{120}\text{ minutes}$

Now, we need to add $\maroonD{45}$ minutes.

$\blueD{120}\text{ minutes}+\maroonD{45}\text{ minutes}=165\text{ minutes}$

options.explanation:
Conversions| | | |||
- | | | |
$1$ kilometer $= 1{,}000$ meters| | $1$ minute $= 60$ seconds|| $1$ liter$= 1{,}000$ milliliters|
$1$ meter $= 100$ centimeter| |$1$ hour $= 60$ minutes|| $1$ kilogram $= 1{,}000$ grams|
$1$ meter $= 1{,}000$ millimeters|| ||$1$ gram $= 1{,}000$ milligrams|
$1$ centimeter $= 10$ millimeters|| |||

assessment_items.question_content:
**Convert.**  

${}$ | ${}$
-: | :-: | :-
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]] seconds| $=$|  $15$ minutes $19$ seconds 

[[☃ explanation 2]]
hints: We need to convert $\blueD{15}$ minutes $\maroonD{19}$ seconds to seconds.

First, let's convert $\blueD{15}$ minutes to seconds.

$1 \text{ minute} = \greenD{60}\text{ seconds}$


$\blueD{15} \text{ minutes} = \blueD{15}\times \greenD{60}=\blueD{900}\text{ seconds}$

Now, we need to add $\maroonD{19}$ seconds.

$\blueD{900}\text{ seconds}+\maroonD{19}\text{ seconds}=919\text{ seconds}$

options.explanation:
Conversions| | | |||
- | | | |
$1$ kilometer $= 1{,}000$ meters| | $1$ minute $= 60$ seconds|| $1$ liter$= 1{,}000$ milliliters|
$1$ meter $= 100$ centimeter| |$1$ hour $= 60$ minutes|| $1$ kilogram $= 1{,}000$ grams|
$1$ meter $= 1{,}000$ millimeters|| ||$1$ gram $= 1{,}000$ milligrams|
$1$ centimeter $= 10$ millimeters|| |||

assessment_items.question_content:
**Convert.**  

${}$ | ${}$
-: | :-: | :-
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]] minutes| $=$|  $8$ hours $37$ minutes

[[☃ explanation 2]]
hints: We need to convert $\blueD{8}$ hours $\maroonD{37}$ minutes to minutes.

First, let's convert $\blueD{8}$ hours to minutes.

$1 \text{ hour} = \greenD{60}\text{ minutes}$

$\blueD{8} \text{ hours} = \blueD{8}\times \greenD{60}=\blueD{480}\text{ minutes}$

Now, we need to add $\maroonD{37}$ minutes.

$\blueD{480}\text{ minutes}+\maroonD{37}\text{ minutes}=517\text{ minutes}$

$1$ meter $= 1{,}000$ millimeters|| ||$1$ gram $= 1{,}000$ milligrams|
$1$ centimeter $= 10$ millimeters|| |||

**Compare using $>,<,$ or $=$.**

$500$  seconds [[☃ dropdown 1]] $5$ minutes 

[[☃ explanation 1]]
hints:
To compare, we need the numbers to have the same units.  

Let's convert $\blueD5$ minutes to seconds.

Now, we can compare.

$500$ seconds $>\blueD{300}$ seconds
